title: Breath Awareness
blurb: The simplest anchor: resting your attention on the breath.

title: Body Scan
blurb: Move attention slowly through the body to release tension and reconnect.

title: Loving-Kindness (Metta)
blurb: Cultivate warmth toward yourself and others with simple phrases.

title: Walking Meditation
blurb: Mindfulness in motion — for when sitting still is hard.

title: NSDR / Yoga Nidra
blurb: Deep guided rest that restores without sleep.

title: Vipassana (Insight)
blurb: Observing experience clearly to see how mind and reality work.

title: Zazen (Zen)
blurb: Just sitting — the heart of Zen practice.

title: Tonglen (Giving & Receiving)
blurb: Breathe in suffering, breathe out relief — a compassion practice.

title: Physiological Sigh
blurb: The fastest way to calm down in real time.

title: Box Breathing
blurb: Equal counts to steady the mind under pressure.

title: 4-7-8 Breathing
blurb: A longer exhale to wind down before sleep.

title: Coherent (Resonance) Breathing
blurb: Slow, even breaths at about six per minute.

title: Diaphragmatic (Belly) Breathing
blurb: Full, low breathing that switches on calm.
